bead.title: runs: specs (FEAT-008/010/019) + cross-cutting e2e + audit event
bead.description: Update FEAT-008 (web UI), FEAT-010 (run architecture), FEAT-019 (agent eval) for the run-detail surface. Cross-cutting e2e covering view → drill → download. Audit event for run-detail access (project membership = visibility).
bead.acceptance: 1. All three FEATs updated. 2. Cross-cutting e2e passes. 3. Audit event recorded on view.
